summary: Iteration 123: Rewards System Visibility & Usability - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 14/14 rewards API tests passed (summary, leaderboard, history, admin lookup, admin simulate). Frontend: Dashboard rewards card, /my-rewards page, /admin/rewards page all working correctly. Sidebar navigation shows 'My Rewards' for members and 'Rewards Admin' for admins.

issues: Console warnings about DialogContent requiring DialogTitle for accessibility - not critical but should be addressed for a11y compliance

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All rewards UI features verified working

backend_rewards_apis.GET /api/rewards/summary: PASSED - Returns user_id, lifetime_points, monthly_points, level, estimated_usdt, min_redeem_points, is_redeemable
backend_rewards_apis.GET /api/rewards/leaderboard: PASSED - Returns current_rank, monthly_points, level, distance_to_next, suggested_message
backend_rewards_apis.GET /api/rewards/history: PASSED - Returns user_id and history array with points, source, balance_after (requires auth)
backend_rewards_apis.GET /api/rewards/admin/lookup: PASSED - Admin can lookup by email or user_id, returns full profile with history
backend_rewards_apis.POST /api/rewards/admin/simulate: PASSED - Admin can simulate manual_bonus, test_trade, test_deposit, test_referral actions

frontend_dashboard.rewards_card: PASSED - Shows Points, USDT estimate, Level badge, Monthly Rank, 'Open Rewards & Store' CTA, 'View all rewards details' link
frontend_dashboard.data_displayed: Points=110, Level=Trader, Rank=#5, motivational message updates correctly

frontend_my_rewards_page.points_card: PASSED - Shows Points Balance with USDT estimate
frontend_my_rewards_page.level_card: PASSED - Shows Level badge with color coding
frontend_my_rewards_page.rank_card: PASSED - Shows Monthly Rank with distance to next
frontend_my_rewards_page.store_link: PASSED - 'Open Rewards & Store' button links to rewards.crosscur.rent
frontend_my_rewards_page.history_table: PASSED - Shows Date, Type (Earn/Spend), Source, Points, Balance columns

frontend_admin_rewards_page.page_loads: PASSED - /admin/rewards route works correctly for admins
frontend_admin_rewards_page.lookup_card: PASSED - Search by email or user_id returns full profile
frontend_admin_rewards_page.lookup_result: PASSED - Shows user name, email, points, USDT, level, rank, monthly, trades
frontend_admin_rewards_page.simulate_card: PASSED - Action type dropdown (Simulate Trade/Deposit/Referral/Manual Bonus)
frontend_admin_rewards_page.manual_bonus: PASSED - Points input appears when Manual Bonus selected
frontend_admin_rewards_page.run_simulation: PASSED - Simulation executes and shows result with new points/level/rank
frontend_admin_rewards_page.history_table: PASSED - Shows user's points history after lookup

sidebar_navigation.member_my_rewards: PASSED - 'My Rewards' nav item visible for regular members
sidebar_navigation.admin_rewards_admin: PASSED - 'Rewards Admin' nav item visible under Admin Section for admins
sidebar_navigation.member_no_admin: PASSED - Admin Section NOT visible for regular members

seed_data_creation: Test simulations added 25 points to Rizza via manual_bonus (admin test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All rewards features implemented and working. Dashboard shows prominent rewards card. /my-rewards page shows full rewards view with history. /admin/rewards page provides user lookup and point simulation tools. Backend API endpoints all functional with proper auth requirements (public: summary/leaderboard, JWT auth: history, admin JWT: lookup/simulate). Note: Welcome tour modal appears on first login - click 'Skip Tour' to dismiss. Signal Blocking modal may also appear - click 'No thanks, dismiss'.
